title: Candle Flame
subtitle: Blow the candle without blowing it out.

steps.text: Imagine a tiny candle in front of you.
steps.hint: The flame is soft and warm.

steps.text: Breathe in slowly through your nose.
steps.hint: Fill your chest with calm air.

steps.text: Now breathe out gently like you're trying to move the flame… but not blow it out.
Try it again: gentle breath in… gentle breath out.
steps.hint: Keep the flame dancing, not gone.
